The avatar drawing block now:
1. Saves canvas state, creates a circular clip path (`ctx.arc` with radius 14px = half of the 28px sprite), clips, draws the image, then restores -- so the square GIF renders as a circle.
2. After restoring, draws a 2px border ring in the persona's color (`PERSONA_COLORS[slug]`) around the circle for visual pop.
